title: Bornaryn Trading Fleet
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The [[Bornaryn Trading Fleet]] was a trading fleet put together by [[Bornan Thul]] after the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|Destruction of Alderaan]]. The ''[[Tradewyn]]'' was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the fleet. It came to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] aid at the [[Battle of the Emperor's Plague Storehouse]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Diversity Alliance]]''
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]''
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''
